name: Cashew Chicken Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :25
1. Combine chicken, celery, onion, soy sauce, ginger, and pepper in a 2-quart casserole dish. Mix well. Cover.
2. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 5-8 minutes or until vegetables are tender and chicken is no longer pink, stirring twice.
3. In a separate cup, blend cornstarch and water. Add to the casserole dish. Stir in remaining ingredients (except cashews).
4. To thicken, microwave uncovered at HIGH (100%) for 15-19 minutes or until mixture is thickened and translucent, stirring 2 or 3 times.
5. Serve over hot cooked rice. Sprinkle with cashews.
